mapper.select: select id, title, category, content, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser from ai_knowledge_base where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_knowledge_base(title, category, content, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values(#{title}, #{category}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update: update ai_knowledge_base set title = #{title}, category = #{category}, content = #{content}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from ( select 'EXPIRED' as type, 'HIGH' as priority, '过期批次需要立即下架' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 已过期 ', abs(datediff(b.expiration_time, now())), ' 天，可售库存 ', greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0)) as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, '建议立即停用批次并做损耗盘点' as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and b.expiration_time < now() and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 union all select 'EXPIRING_SOON' as type, case when datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) <= 1 then 'HIGH' else 'MEDIUM' end as priority, '临期批次需要加速流转' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 距过期 ', datediff(b.expiration_time, now()), ' 天，可售库存 ', greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0)) as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, case when datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) <= 1 then '建议立即进入清仓价并置顶展示' else '建议提高曝光并启用临期折扣' end as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and b.expiration_time >= now() and datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) <= 3 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 union all select 'SOLD_OUT' as type, 'LOW' as priority, '批次已售罄' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 已无可售库存') as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, '建议将批次状态调整为售罄并补充新批次' as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and b.stock_quantity <= b.sold_quantity union all select 'OVERSTOCK' as type, 'MEDIUM' as priority, '高库存批次需要运营干预' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 可售库存 ', greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0), '，存在滞销风险') as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, '建议组合促销或下调动态定价规则' as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) between 4 and 10 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) >= 50 ) t left join ai_ops_suggestion_action a on a.suggestion_id = concat(t.type, '-', t.batchId) where coalesce(a.status, 'pending') = 'pending' order by case priority when 'HIGH' then 1 when 'MEDIUM' then 2 else 3 end, daysToExpire asc, availableQuantity desc limit #{limit}

select * from ( select 'EXPIRED' as type, 'HIGH' as priority, '过期批次需要立即下架' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 已过期 ', abs(datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time)), ' 天，可售库存 ', greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0)) as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, '建议立即停用批次并做损耗盘点' as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and b.expiration_time < now() and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 union all select 'EXPIRING_SOON' as type, case when datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time) <= 1 then 'HIGH' else 'MEDIUM' end as priority, '临期批次需要加速流转' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 距过期 ', datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time), ' 天，可售库存 ', greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0)) as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, case when datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time) <= 1 then '建议立即进入清仓价并置顶展示' else '建议提高曝光并启用临期折扣' end as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and b.expiration_time >= now() and datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time) <= 3 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 union all select 'SOLD_OUT' as type, 'LOW' as priority, '批次已售罄' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 已无可售库存') as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, '建议将批次状态调整为售罄并补充新批次' as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and b.stock_quantity <= b.sold_quantity union all select 'OVERSTOCK' as type, 'MEDIUM' as priority, '高库存批次需要运营干预' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 可售库存 ', greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0), '，存在滞销风险') as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, '建议组合促销或下调动态定价规则' as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time) between 4 and 10 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) >= 50 ) t left join ai_ops_suggestion_action a on a.suggestion_id = concat(t.type, '-', t.batchId) where coalesce(a.status, 'pending') = 'pending' order by case priority when 'HIGH' then 1 when 'MEDIUM' then 2 else 3 end, daysToExpire asc, availableQuantity desc limit #{limit}

select id, admin_user_id as adminUserId, title, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from ai_ops_chat_session where admin_user_id = #{adminUserId} order by update_time desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ai_ops_chat_session(admin_user_id, title, create_time, update_time) values(#{adminUserId}, #{title}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into ai_ops_chat_message(session_id, role, content, provider, model, references_json, create_time) values(#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{provider}, #{model}, #{referencesJson}, #{createTime})

insert into ai_ops_suggestion_action(suggestion_id, status, actor_id, create_time, update_time) values(#{suggestionId}, #{status}, #{actorId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) on duplicate key update status = values(status), actor_id = values(actor_id), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.select: select id, suggestion_id as suggestionId, action, status, target_type as targetType, target_id as targetId, target_name as targetName, operation_summary as operationSummary, operation_payload as operationPayload, actor_id as actorId, create_time as createTime from ai_ops_suggestion_action_log order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{limit}
